mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.plan_id, s.stage, s.image_url, s.uploaded_by, s.created_at, u.nickname, u.profile_image_url FROM plan_stage_photos s JOIN users u ON u.id = s.uploaded_by WHERE s.plan_id = #{planId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO plan_stage_photos (plan_id, stage, image_url, uploaded_by) VALUES (#{planId}, #{stage}, #{imageUrl}, #{uploadedBy})
